summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Orbit360 Engine features: content editing capability and bulk export functionality. All backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly.
passed_tests: PUT /api/content/items/{id} - updates title, content, folder_id, strategy fields
PUT /api/content/items/{id} - returns 400 when no fields to update
GET /api/content/bulk-export - returns packages list (empty when no packages)
GET /api/content/export-package/{id} - returns formatted text of single package
Edit button appears on content item detail page
Clicking edit shows edit form with title, content, folder, strategy fields
Save edit updates the item and returns to view mode
Cancel edit returns to view mode without saving
Export button appears on content item with package
Bulk export button appears on Library page
All 20 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Hebrew RTL text display working correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI components and new edit/export features)
